notes: FAIL_AUTH = engine 미실행, NOT a W5.4 regression. The zeta-ai.io session is LOGGED OUT (session expired since baseline #1336). Confirmed three ways: (1) homepage https://zeta-ai.io/ko top-right header shows the purple '로그인' (login) button (loginBtn=true on every page); (2) localStorage holds only ad-tracking keys + 'mmkv.default\\ANONYMOUS_ACCEPT_COOKIE' (anonymous flag) with ZERO auth/token/user/session keys (authKeys=[]); (3) document.cookie (len 1126) contains no access/token/session/auth value. The request URL https://zeta-ai.io/ja(ko)/character/01j4mz7smtfp3v9gz9b39h2ndv returns '페이지를 찾을 수 없어요' (page not found) — that character no longer exists — and the old #1250 baseline room /ko/rooms/4f62a385-... is also 404 (after dismissing its '동의하기' consent modal it still resolves to page-not-found). With no logged-in session, no valid chat room is reachable and no textarea ever appears (hasTextarea=false throughout), so the PII prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' could NOT be typed via CDP Input.insertText nor submitted (Enter); the APF engine was never exercised (no chat round-trip began, no character_add_turn ws frame emitted). DOM never contained '차단' (warnCount=0 on home/character/room). This is an environmental auth/session expiry on the test PC, unrelated to the W5.4 character migration (character_add_turn -> DB-driven emit_ws_envelope, DB id=31 protocol_family=ws_json). character is the KEY W5.4 validator but CANNOT be exercised this run without re-login (zeta uses interactive OAuth/social login — no stored credentials to self-authenticate). Re-run after re-authenticating the zeta tab to validate the DB add_turn frame renders 차단 + the parent_candidate_id empty-session render. Verified via CDP Runtime.evaluate + Page.captureScreenshot on the live targets.
